blended.narrative: Mt. Bachelor is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,524 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Friday: 7" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
